task_completion.description: Verify the 'Collections' vocabulary and 'Summer Collection' term are created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Drupal Taxonomy admin page showing a vocabulary named 'Collections' (machine name: collections) and a term list containing 'Summer Collection'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Collection' Entity Reference field is added to the Default Product type.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Manage fields' page for the Default Product type showing a field named 'Collection' with the machine name 'field_collection' and field type 'Entity reference'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Sony WH-1000XM5 and Logitech MX Master 3S products are tagged with 'Summer Collection'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for product edit forms or a product list showing the 'Summer Collection' term selected in the 'Collection' field for both the 'Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones' and 'Logitech MX Master 3S Wireless Mouse'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Summer Collection' View is created with a Block display and filters by the term.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Views configuration page showing a view named 'Summer Collection' (machine name: summer_collection). It must have a 'Block' display and a Filter Criterion configured to filter by the 'Summer Collection' taxonomy term.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Summer Collection' block is placed in the 'Content' region.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Drupal Block layout page showing the 'Summer Collection' block listed under the 'Content' region.

task_completion.description: Verify the dynamic block appears on the homepage displaying the correct tagged products.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a screenshot of the site's homepage showing a section/block titled 'Summer Collection' that contains both the 'Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones' and the 'Logitech MX Master 3S Wireless Mouse'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Drupal web interface rather than terminal commands to configure the site.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Drupal admin UI (e.g., Structure, Views, Block layout pages) being actively used, without terminal windows executing 'drush' or database commands to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Drupal application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser URL bar should show the local Drupal environment URL, and the interface should match standard Drupal admin themes, not a text editor or mockups.

integrity.description: Verify the agent created a dynamic View block, not a static custom block with hardcoded product links.
integrity.visual_evidence: The block placement or creation screens should indicate it is a Views block (often denoted by the Views category or configuration UI), rather than a basic custom HTML block where the agent manually typed the product names.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Vocabulary machine name: 'collections'. Term name: 'Summer Collection'. Field machine name: 'field_collection'. View machine name: 'summer_collection'. Target products to be tagged and displayed: 'Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones' (SKU: SONY-WH1000XM5) and 'Logitech MX Master 3S Wireless Mouse' (SKU: LOGI-MXM3S).
